1.name: Anvil
1.description:
A heavy anvil from a blacksmith’s workshop, somehow carried 
around as equipment. Its hardness and weight make it perfect for
sharpening weapons, though it may be tough for the inexperienced...
1.ability:
Senpo changes to pulling out the anvil to repair weapons
Cannot repair magic weapons or golden-quality weapons
2.name: Jeweled Armament
2.description:
Minerals slumbering underground are good alchemical media
This dagger-shaped magitech device channels the power of precious 
gems, but its costly use led most alchemists to abandon it…
2.ability:
Randomly consumes a gem on attack to charge and enhance damage
The more precious the gem, the greater the added magic damage
3.name: Odd Hair Accessory
3.description:
A hair accessory adorned with an unusual ornament
Is it a rabbit… or a bun…?
5.name: Safety Gloves
5.description:
Protective gloves made from insulating materials, 
originally used by workers as everyday safety gear. Surprisingly, 
they also provide strong resistance against magical attacks...
5.ability: Greatly reduces the effect of lightning when equipped
6.name: Birth of Misfortune
6.description:
Parasitized by a Philosopher Stone, a weak creature was forcibly
infused with endless vitality, endlessly cycling between life and
death until madness took over. Even removed, this power remains
6.ability:
Increases HP. Enhances HP recovery effects by 25%
Grants automatic regeneration when equipped
7.name: Cursed Fetus
7.description:
An undeveloped cursed fetus that, despite everything,
remains alive.Its intense will to survive and overflowing
vitality can even influence its bearer
7.ability: Increases HP. Enhances HP recovery effects by 20%
8.name: Mana Crystal Cluster
8.description:
A mineral shaped by the Great Labyrinth, containing trace mana
Carrying it enhances magical understanding
8.ability:
Equipping it boosts casting speed and magic power
Magical weapons’ attacks deal an extra 5% magic damage
9.name: Abyssal Mana Cluster
9.description:
A rare cluster infused with dense mana,
radiating palpable magical waves. Highly sought after by alchemists
9.ability:
Equipping it boosts casting speed and magic power
Magical weapons’ attacks deal an extra 10% magic damage
10.name: Focus Circlet
10.description:
A circlet worn by the great sage during their youth as an
adventurer. It helps focus the mind and blocks external distractions
10.ability:
Immune to Stun
Enhances magic power and casting scale
11.name: Mana Draining Gloves
11.description:
Gloves worn by the great sage during their youth as
an adventurer. They gather mana naturally,
imbuing weapons with magical properties
11.ability:
When equipped, the held weapon transforms into a magical weapon
Magical weapons’ attacks deal an extra 30% magic damage
12.name: Borrowed Neko Claws
12.subtitle: "...Meow~?"
12.description:
Neko claws hidden inside a Neko Slime, seemingly infused
with a cat’s spirit. Equipping them boosts your agility!
12.ability:
Increases attack power and attack speed
Reduces fall damage by 30%
13.name: Borrowed Neko Paws
13.subtitle: "...Meow~?"
13.description:
Neko paws hidden inside a Neko Slime, seemingly infused
with a cat’s spirit. Equipping them boosts your agility!
13.ability:
Increases attack and movement speed, reduces Senpo cooldown
Reduces fall damage by 30%
14.name: Fragrant Grass Ring
14.description:
A ring woven from leaves and rhizomes, emitting a herbal scent
Once a charm for travelers, it symbolizes vitality and energy
14.ability:
Max HP +\c[29]${QJ.MPMZ.tl.ex_fragrantGrassRingEffectResolve()}\c[0]
Equip multiple copies to enhance the effect and gain additional bonuses
15.name: Neko Plush Suit
15.description:
A soft and cuddly cat plush costume — fluffy and oversized
Its roomy design wraps you up and even hides extra goodies~
15.ability:
Extra carry capacity for weapons +10
Extra carry capacity for gears +20
16.name: Piercing Spike Helmet
16.description:
A spiked metal armor exuding danger from every angle,
offering solid defense and automatically damaging nearby enemies
17.name: Piercing Spike Armour
17.description:
A spiked metal armor exuding danger from every angle,
offering solid defense and automatically damaging nearby enemies
18.name: Piercing Spike Gauntlets
18.description:
A spiked metal armor exuding danger from every angle,
offering solid defense and automatically damaging nearby enemies
18.ability: Automatically damages nearby enemies when attacking
19.name: Piercing Spike Boots
19.description:
A spiked metal armor exuding danger from every angle,
offering solid defense and automatically damaging nearby enemies
19.ability: Automatically damages nearby enemies when moving
20.name: Knight's Helmet
20.description:
The standard armor of court knights. Its ornate and sturdy design
symbolizes their adherence to the chivalric code
20.ability: Increases defense when HP is below \c[10]30%\c[0]
21.name: Knight's Armour
21.description:
The standard armor of court knights. Its ornate and sturdy design
symbolizes their adherence to the chivalric code
21.ability: Increases defense when HP is below \c[10]30%\c[0]
22.name: Knight's Gauntlets
22.description:
The standard armor of court knights. Its ornate and sturdy design
symbolizes their adherence to the chivalric code
22.ability: Increases attack and defense when HP is below \c[10]30%\c[0]
23.name: Knight's Greaves
23.description:
The standard armor of court knights. Its ornate and sturdy design
symbolizes their adherence to the chivalric code
23.ability: Increases movement speed when HP is below \c[10]30%\c[0]
24.name: Hunter’s Garb
24.description:
Stitched from thick hide and tough linen, it was once the everyday 
gear of forest hunters. Though defense is limited, it’s light and 
flexible, letting the wearer move quickly through the woods
24.ability: Slowly regenerates HP when standing on grassy terrain
25.name: Hunter’s Belt
25.description:
Crafted from sturdy leather and adorned with durable buckles
and pouches. Once essential for forest hunters on their journeys, 
it remains light and unburdensome even during long treks
25.ability:
Max HP +20, movement speed increased
Extra carry capacity for weapons +5, for gear +5
26.name: Feather of Firebird
26.description:
A Firebird feather.
symbolizing eternal life, still burning with a warm flame.
Even a single feather holds the power to revive the dead.
26.ability:
Activates when HP drops to zero, fully restores HP
The item is destroyed after activation
27.name: Toilet Paper
27.description:
A Toilet Paper take from Home
A handy item for adventurers who suddenly need
a toilet break in a dangerous dungeon
28.name: Oni Hand
28.description:
A massive arm brimming with the brute strength of the Oni clan
It symbolizes a power so fierce it can easily crush solid rock
For humans, it is a force far too difficult to control
28.ability:
Physical attack power +100%. Attack speed decreases
Weapons are more likely to break during attacks
29.name: Saucy Jacky
29.subtitle: "This one craves screams..."
29.description:
One of the deadly weapons of a notorious killer,
still twitching with anticipation
29.ability: Deals more damage to lower HP foes, up to \c[10]30%\c[0]
30.name: Hunter's Dagger
30.subtitle: "Death from the muzzle, fortune from the blade"
30.description:
A small, sharp dagger that fits easily in a boot
To a hunter, it always draws out the prey’s final offering
31.name: Misty Night Phantom
31.subtitle: "This one longs to vanish..."
31.description:
One of the deadly tools of a notorious murderer,
crafted to conceal its presence
31.ability:
Periodically enters an invisible state
Assassinations while invisible deal double damage
32.name: Neko Punch
32.description:
"Hyaa—!! Don’t mess with me nya!"
Soft-padded cat paw gloves, the prized weapon of a certain catgirl
Wearing them grants feline agility—and a craving for fish…
32.ability:
Attack speed increased. Extra attack hits +1
Chance of extra attack hits triggering special effects is halved
33.name: Apple Headgear
33.description:
A headgear made from apples, so you can't
really expect any defense. But the apples are so delicious
33.ability: There’s a chance to activate healing when injured
34.name: Sharpblade Ring
34.description:
Legend says an adventurer, too afraid of fighting barehanded, 
embedded a sword into a ring. It’s far too small to use, 
but it sure boosts one’s presence
35.name: Wakizashi
35.description:
A finely crafted short blade, often carried by foreign samurai 
as a sidearm. Though short, its edge can tear flesh wide open,
leaving wounds that won’t easily stop bleeding
35.ability:
Normal attack count with melee weapons +1
Extra attack has a chance to inflict Bleed
36.name: Maneki Neko
36.description:
A greedy little Servant with a perpetually unsatisfied look
It eagerly gathers all dropped items, regardless of their value
36.ability:
Maneki Neko automatically collects all types of drops for you
Equipping multiple will only increase the collection range
37.name: Piggy Bank
37.description:
A cute Servant that stores collected money
Something might happen when full, but for now, it's just fragile
37.ability:
Happily collects money. Current savings: \c[6]${$gameSelfVariables.value([1, 110, 'deposit'])}\c[0]yen!
Easily breaks when attacked, losing all stored money
38.name: Greedy Piggy Bank
38.description:
A piggy bank overflowing with wealth, a dream come true
Yet, even with a belly full of gold, its greed knows no bounds
38.ability:
Emits Mamon’s Demand aura. Current savings: \c[6]${$gameSelfVariables.value([1, 110, 'deposit'])}\c[0]yen!
Collects money endlessly, spitting out interest every 10 seconds
39.name: Green Turtle Shell
39.description:
A tough and heavy turtle shell
Carrying it on land makes it impossible to lift your feet…!
39.ability: Slows movement speed, but increases swimming speed
40.name: Maid Uniform
40.description:
A trophy obtained after teaching a lesson to the mischievous
rabbit-eared girl. It still carries the scent of dirt and carrots
40.ability:
When equipped, disguises as a monster but cannot attack
Equipping it makes you best friends with Maid Bunny
41.name: Moe Bunny Ears
41.description:
A detachable bunny ear accessory
No matter who wears it, they’ll look absolutely adorable!
41.ability: Blessed with luck! Items are more likely to drop!
42.name: Bomb Fiend's Soul
42.subtitle: "Explo————sion!!"
42.description:
A will that sacrificed everything for explosions
Now that you bear it, won’t you strive for even bigger blasts?
42.ability:
Small chance to trigger an explosion when attacking or hit
Reduce self-taken explosion damage by 50%
43.name: Bladekeepers’ Badge
43.subtitle:
"You adventurers make me sick!
Swinging your blades only to kill, never caring about their pain!"
43.description: A badge worn only by comrades who believe in weapon preservation
43.ability:
Attack power -20%, max attack capped at 200
Reduces all weapon durability loss by 20%
44.subtitle: "The Sacabambaspis has seen it all before."
44.description:
A legendary ancient Servant—though it’s a fish, it can’t swim
It has tough skin, and its special move is a Cyclone Jet Cannon!
44.ability:
Can lift up the Saccabankame turtle and throw it as an attack
Once it falls into the water, it can’t get back out...
45.name: Venomous Embrace
45.subtitle: "This dagger's loaded with deadly poison, y'know— (lick"
45.description: A poisonous magical shortsword—keep your distance
45.ability:
An auto-orbiting Servant
High chance to inflict Poison on contact
46.name: Fist of Fury
46.subtitle: "Left hand hits hard, right hand hits harder."
46.description:
A powerful magical fist
Seething with unknown rage, it remains tightly clenched…
46.ability:
An auto-orbiting Servant
Knocks back any enemy it touches
47.name: Xerise’s Cursed Hand
47.description:
A severed hand imbued with undead power
Even without a body, it remains lively and aggressive
47.ability:
An auto-orbiting Servant
Curses any target it points its middle finger at
48.name: Chain SpellBinding Contract
48.subtitle:
"When the one you love dies, you must take your own life.
When the one you love dies, there is no other way."
48.description: To save his familiar, a certain alchemist forged this contract…
48.ability:
Link with your servant—any damage they take will be yours
Each linked servant grants you a healing effect
49.name: Red Horn
49.subtitle: "Don't you ever stop！"
49.description:
A crimson horn filled with the Jackalope’s magic
If magic could be supplied endlessly, it might keep accelerating 
until it became a comet streaking across the sky!
49.ability:
When fully charged, Senpo has no cooldown and moves faster
Once the charge is depleted, it will auto-recharge
50.name: Potato Chips
50.description:
Freshly fried with a warm,
savory aroma. Watch out for seagulls!
50.ability: Attracts seagulls that steal your chips
52.name: Shadowcrawler Gift
52.description:
Said to be a symbol from the depths where shadows creep
holding it makes you feel as if something is 
quietly writhing behind you—
52.ability:
Movement speed increases
Gain the attention of ▓▓▓▓▓▓▓
53.name: Hanged Man's Bone Ring
53.description:
A ring made from the bones of the deceased Hanged Man
Though most of its power is lost,
it still grants the wearer a bit of freedom from gravity
53.ability:
Reduces fall damage by 80%
AoE damage from falling increased by 100%
54.name: Incomplete Golden Grail
54.description:
A saint’s relic yet to be filled, it blesses the holder with
immense luck. The source of this blessing remains unknown,
as it quietly awaits the day it will be complete
54.ability: Greatly increases luck. Doubles money earned
55.name: Arsonist’s Gloves
55.subtitle: "Hah, Such filthy fireworks."
55.description: Thick, heatproof gloves reeking of gunpowder
55.ability:
+30% explosion radius for self-triggered bombs
Bombs have a chance to trigger chain explosions
56.name: Saint Maiden’s Mercy
56.subtitle: "Good child, good child..."
56.description:
One of the nun's attires, silky smooth to the touch, unforgettable
Holy radiance flows through its fibers, offering comfort
56.ability:
Forcibly enters Sage Mode
Gain more affinity when patting \str[120]’s head
57.name: Ichigo Wo Torimodose!!
57.description:
ASABA, consumed by grief over the lost strawberry, 
unleashes his ultimate art. Once targeted, you’re swallowed
by an unavoidable storm of combos… But sorrow lingers—
burned by fate’s emotions, you too inherit this forbidden technique!
57.ability: Unlock and allow the use of Skill \c[27]Musou Burst Stream
59.name: Rubrum Pendant
59.description:
The Fallen Magician’s Precious Relic. 
A pendant crafted from a small amount of Philosopher's Fragment 
imbued with a faint yet everlasting alchemical power
59.ability:
Boosts magic attack based on held Philosopher's Fragment count
Reduces weapon durability use when casting magic by \c[6]24%\c[0]
60.name: Fallen Mage's Circlet
60.description:
A cursed circlet tainted by dark magic,
haunted by a stubborn grudge that gnaws at the flesh
61.name: Fallen Mage's Cloak
61.description:
A cursed cloak tainted by dark magic,
haunted by a vengeful spirit craving retribution
61.ability:
Afterimages created by Senpo linger longer
Objects touched by them are frozen in place
62.name: Fallen Mage's Gloves
62.description:
Cursed gloves tainted by dark magic,
infused with a vengeful spirit eager to attack
63.name: Fallen Mage's Shoes
63.description:
Cursed shoes tainted by dark magic,
infused with a vengeful spirit that grants ghost-like agility
63.ability: Boosts movement speed, grants void state when using Senpo
65.name: Determination Headband
65.subtitle: "Who the hell do you think I am!?"
65.description:
A headband that stirs passion when worn
No real effect, but its unyielding spirit is unmatched
65.ability:
reduces abnormal status chance
Has a small chance to resist fatal damage
67.name: Martial Artist's Bracers
67.description:
Bandaged bracers worn by martial artists during sparring
They protect joints while improving movement precision
67.ability:
-12% weapon durability consumption
Increased attack speed & boosted unarmed combo damage
68.name: Martial Artist's Shoes
68.description:
Shoes commonly worn by martial artists who have
mastered their craft, radiating a powerful aura
69.name: Face Breaker
69.subtitle: "Damn it... I just wanna punch someone in the face...!"
69.description:
Punching gloves left behind by a legendary boxer.
You can still feel the overwhelming force lingering on them.
69.ability:
Cannot use weapons while equipped
Punch attacks may deal bonus damage based on target HP
70.name: Scarecrow's Heart
70.description:
A hollow body of a scarecrow
No warmth, no heartbeat—yet it can live in your place
70.ability:
Prevents all forms of HP recovery while equipped
At 0 HP, you remain active a bit longer before falling
71.name: Permafrost Crystal
71.subtitle: "My heart has gone cold... I guess I'll never feel joy or sorrow ever again..."
71.description:
A magical crystal that emits a bone-chilling frost
Even in the sweltering heat, one can still feel its freezing breath
71.ability:
Immune to Burning and Heatstroke states
Increases shatter damage dealt when breaking an enemy's Frozen state
73.name: Lava Ring
73.description:
A ring forged from rock flowing with scorching magma
Wearing it eases the pain from both frost and flame
73.ability:
Greatly reduces the chance of being frozen
Reduces the chance of being burned
74.name: Volumen Salamandrae
74.subtitle: "Yes, they do like chili peppers..."
74.description:
A grimoire bound with salamander scales. Though it resembles
an encyclopedia, its records of volcano-dwelling salamanders 
grant deeper insight into fire when studied.
74.ability: Strengthens the damage and form of fire-element magic
75.name: Demon Eyeball
75.description:
An eyeball taken from a demon. It’s still watching.  
Demons skilled at manipulating minds often possess the ability 
to see through things. Perhaps it allows you to notice details 
that would otherwise be overlooked...
75.ability: Reveals hidden objects and paths while equipped
77.name: A Maiden's Prayer
77.subtitle: "Fish… so many fish… piles of salmon…"
77.description:
A prayer offered by an archdemon obsessed with eating salmon
Saying it can warp reality might be a bit of an exaggeration…
but she is genuinely, earnestly waiting for offerings to arrive
80.name: Royal Decree
80.description:
A ring symbolizing the supreme glory of a true king
Greatly boosts follower morale!
80.ability:
Slightly increases all stats
Enlarges all servants and enhances their special attributes
100.name: Unit I Nexus
100.description:
A core far more advanced than modern tech, its surface glowing 
with mysterious energy circuits. Even with most parts missing, 
it still shows incredible computational and sensing power
100.ability:
Grants area detection when equipped
Detected object types increase as the core’s level rises
125.name: Atsu Atsu Bouzu
125.description:
A cloth doll made with someone's heartfelt prayers. It carries
wishes, bringing slight changes to regular weather patterns
However, The doll quietly disappears afterward
125.ability: Ensures scorching hot weather the next day when equipped
126.name: Teru Teru Bouzu
126.description:
A cloth doll made with someone's heartfelt prayers. It carries
wishes, bringing slight changes to regular weather patterns
However, The doll quietly disappears afterward
126.ability: Ensures sunny weather the next day when equipped
127.name: Kumo Kumo Bouzu
127.description:
A cloth doll made with someone's heartfelt prayers. It carries
wishes, bringing slight changes to regular weather patterns
However, The doll quietly disappears afterward
127.ability: Ensures cloudy weather the next day when equipped
128.name: Ame Ame Bouzu
128.description:
A cloth doll made with someone's heartfelt prayers. It carries
wishes, bringing slight changes to regular weather patterns
However, The doll quietly disappears afterward
128.ability: Ensures rainy weather the next day when equipped
129.name: A girl's smile
129.subtitle: "\str[121], you kept your promise well!"
129.description:
The perfect smile finally shown by \str[120] 
who has always admired and worried about \str[121]—
a smile that becomes his motivation to keep moving forward
130.name: \str[120]'s removed panties
130.subtitle: "It still carries \str[120]'s scent..."
130.description:
Panties received from \str[120] due to a misunderstanding
Although no suitable chance to return it has ever come up,
deep down inside, a faint sense of joy quietly lingers...
131.name: Bunny Plush
131.subtitle: "Waaah—! Don’t break it~~!"
131.description:
A stuffed bunny plush that \str[120] always carries in 
her arms, filled with her scent
Come to think of it… why is this in my hands?
147.name: Woundplast
150.name: Bonus T-shirt
150.description:
A custom-made outfit from the knight,
supposedly for promoting the game
But I don’t really want to wear it
152.name: \str[120]’s Pajamas
152.description:
A camisole pajama that \str[120] usually wears, 
decorated with the bows she loves.
Come to think of it… why is this in my hands?
153.name: \str[120]’s Shorts
153.description:
Soft and fluffy shorts that \str[120] usually wears, 
decorated with the bows she loves.
Come to think of it… why is this in my hands?
154.name: Blue white panties
155.name: Pink white panties
156.name: White panties
157.name: Woundplast
159.name: No panties...
296.name: Ruika’s Lucky Mallet
296.subtitle: "Head Maid Ruika always uses it to bonk the disobedient bunnies."
296.description:
A hidden treasure of Maid Bunnies, said to be why they took over the 
market so fast. With a light swing, it grants the wielder’s wishes—
Adventurers often see it fixing machines broken by troublemakers
296.ability: Increases money and item drop rates
297.name: Mio’s First Aid Kit
297.subtitle: "Oh my god! I fell into the hole again!?"
297.description:
Originally a tool the admin used to test the healing system
but he forgot to delete it later. Still, it’s useless 
against instant-death mechanics
297.ability: Restores 100% HP per second when equipped
298.name: Shiroin’s Golden Finger
298.subtitle:
"You know this thing will ruin the game, right?"
"I know."
"And you still want to equip it?"
"Of course."
298.description: A relic that turns touch to gold — the Bladekeepers’ ultimate dream
298.ability: Weapons no longer break from attacks
299.name: Absolute Territory
299.description:
The sacred space between a girl's miniskirt and thigh-high socks
Not only does it grant high magic resistance, but also the absurd 
ability to pull out all sorts of items from under the skirt at will
299.ability:
Extra carry capacity for weapons +99
Extra carry capacity for gears +99
300.name: Catalyst Amatoria
300.subtitle: "Give me your love—! Otherwise, let’s just die together~~~!"
300.description:
A forbidden artifact forged by a certain yandere archdemon
It forcibly makes anyone it touches fall in love with the wearer
ignoring their will
300.ability: Greatly boosts the stats gained when patting \str[120]
